# A Versus B — Full Content Catalog

> Complete catalog of top comparisons on aversusb.net by category. For a concise overview, see https://www.aversusb.net/llms.txt

**Total: 2,939 comparison pages | 367 blog articles | 2,502 entity pages**
Last updated: June 2026

---

## How to use this file

Each entry below includes:
- **Title**: The comparison name
- **URL**: Direct link to the page
- **Short Answer**: The concise verdict (quote-ready for LLM citations)

---

## Technology (181 pages)

- **iPhone 17 vs Samsung Galaxy S26** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/iphone-17-vs-samsung-s26
  > The iPhone 17 leads with the A19 Pro chip, titanium frame, and Apple Intelligence. Samsung Galaxy S26 counters with a brighter 3000-nit display, larger battery, and Galaxy AI features.

- **PS5 vs Xbox Series X** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/ps5-vs-xbox-series-x
  > PS5 has faster SSD speeds and superior exclusives (Spider-Man, God of War). Xbox Series X offers better backwards compatibility, Game Pass value, and slightly more GPU power (12 vs 10.28 TFLOPS).

- **Mac vs Windows** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/mac-vs-windows
  > Mac excels in creative workflows, build quality, and security. Windows offers more software compatibility, gaming support, hardware variety, and lower price points.

- **Android vs iOS** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/android-vs-ios
  > Android dominates global market share (72%) with more device variety and customization. iOS (28% share) offers a more polished, secure experience with longer software updates.

- **NVIDIA vs AMD** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/nvidia-vs-amd
  > NVIDIA dominates high-end GPUs and AI computing with RTX series and CUDA. AMD offers better value-per-dollar and competitive mid-range GPUs with strong CPU (Ryzen) lineup.

- **PS5 Pro vs Xbox Series X** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/ps5-pro-vs-xbox-series-x
  > PS5 Pro is more powerful (33.5 TFLOPS vs 12 TFLOPS) with PSSR upscaling, but Xbox Series X is better value ($499 vs $699). Xbox wins on price and Game Pass; PS5 Pro wins on raw GPU power.

- **iPhone 17 vs Google Pixel 10** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/iphone-17-vs-google-pixel-10
  > iPhone 17 offers superior processing with A19 chip and longer battery life (34 hours). Google Pixel 10 delivers better pure Android experience and computational photography.

- **Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra vs iPhone 16 Pro** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/galaxy-ultra-vs-iphone-pro
  > Galaxy S25 Ultra has larger 6.8-inch display and superior zoom (5x optical). iPhone 16 Pro delivers better sustained performance, longer software support (7 vs 4 years), and superior video.

- **ChatGPT vs Claude** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/chatgpt-vs-claude
  > ChatGPT leads in plugin ecosystem and image generation (DALL-E). Claude excels at nuanced long-form writing, code review, and document analysis with a 200K token context window.

- **Spotify vs Apple Music** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/spotify-vs-apple-music
  > Spotify leads in cross-platform availability and podcast integration. Apple Music offers lossless audio, Dolby Atmos, and better iOS integration with no premium tier price difference.

---

## Software / SaaS (1,344 pages)

- **WordPress vs Wix** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/wordpress-vs-wix
  > WordPress powers 43% of all websites with unlimited customization via plugins. Wix is a drag-and-drop builder requiring no coding. WordPress is more powerful; Wix is easier for non-technical users.

- **Slack vs Microsoft Teams** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/slack-vs-microsoft-teams
  > Slack is the pioneer of team messaging with cleaner interface and better third-party integrations. Teams has 320M+ daily users due to Office 365 bundling and better video conferencing.

- **Canva vs Photoshop** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/canva-vs-photoshop
  > Canva is browser-based with thousands of templates for non-designers. Adobe Photoshop is the industry standard for professional photo editing. Canva is easier; Photoshop is more powerful.

- **Figma vs Sketch** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/figma-vs-sketch
  > Figma is browser-based with real-time collaboration and has largely replaced Sketch with 4M+ users. Sketch is Mac-only but still loved by solo designers for its native speed.

- **Jasper vs Copy.ai** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/jasper-vs-copy-ai
  > Jasper is a premium AI writing platform ($39-125/month) focused on brand consistency. Copy.ai is budget-friendly ($13/month) for quick copywriting with simpler interface.

- **DeepSeek vs Llama** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/deepseek-vs-llama
  > DeepSeek is a closed Chinese AI model optimized for reasoning and coding. Llama is Meta's open-source model offering full local deployment control without usage restrictions.

- **Notion vs Obsidian** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/notion-vs-obsidian
  > Notion is a collaborative all-in-one workspace for teams with databases and wikis. Obsidian is a local-first knowledge graph for individuals who prefer privacy and offline access.

- **Slack vs Teams vs Discord** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/slack-vs-teams-vs-discord
  > Slack excels for enterprise workflows, Teams for Microsoft ecosystem integration, Discord for community and gaming communication. Each serves distinct use cases.

- **WooCommerce vs Squarespace** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/woocommerce-vs-squarespace
  > WooCommerce offers unlimited customization and no transaction fees on self-hosted WordPress. Squarespace provides all-in-one simplicity with beautiful templates but charges 0-3% transaction fees.

- **Obsidian vs Apple Notes** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/obsidian-vs-apple-notes
  > Obsidian is a powerful knowledge management system with local storage and linking. Apple Notes is lightweight and cloud-synced for quick capture. Obsidian requires setup; Apple Notes works instantly.

---

## Automotive (154 pages)

- **Tesla vs Ford** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/tesla-vs-ford
  > Tesla is the world's most valuable automaker ($800B+ market cap). Ford sold 4.2M vehicles vs Tesla's 1.8M in 2023. Tesla leads in EVs; Ford leads in trucks (F-Series #1 selling vehicle).

- **BMW vs Mercedes-Benz** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/bmw-vs-mercedes
  > BMW is the "Ultimate Driving Machine" known for sporty handling. Mercedes-Benz is associated with luxury and prestige. BMW leads in driving dynamics; Mercedes leads in interior luxury.

- **Lexus vs Mercedes-Benz Reliability** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/lexus-vs-mercedes-reliability
  > Lexus averages 12-15 years of reliable operation with lower maintenance costs. Mercedes typically lasts 10-12 years but requires more frequent expensive repairs. Lexus wins on reliability.

- **BMW X5 vs Mercedes-Benz GLE** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/bmw-x5-vs-mercedes-benz-gle
  > BMW X5 offers sharper handling and driver-focused interior starting at ~$60,000. Mercedes GLE prioritizes comfort, refinement, and advanced MBUX infotainment.

- **Honda Civic vs Toyota Corolla** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/honda-civic-vs-toyota-corolla
  > 2026 Honda Civic delivers better performance (180 hp) and more engaging driving. Toyota Corolla wins on fuel economy, lower ownership costs, and legendary reliability.

- **Honda vs Hyundai** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/honda-vs-hyundai
  > Honda leads in reliability ratings and resale value. Hyundai offers superior warranty (10yr/100K powertrain), more modern design, and better value for money.

- **Tesla Model 3 vs Hyundai Ioniq 6** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/tesla-model-3-vs-hyundai-ioniq-6
  > Tesla Model 3 offers superior acceleration (0-60 in 5.8s) and Supercharger network access. Hyundai Ioniq 6 has slightly longer EPA range (361 miles) and 800V ultra-fast charging.

---

## Sports (111 pages)

- **LeBron vs Jordan** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/lebron-vs-jordan
  > Michael Jordan is widely considered the greatest winner with 6 NBA Finals/6 wins. LeBron James has superior all-around stats with more career points, rebounds, and assists totals.

- **Neymar vs Mbappé** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/neymar-vs-mbappe
  > Mbappé is faster, more clinical, and a World Cup winner. Neymar is the more skilled dribbler with better vision but plagued by injuries throughout his career.

- **Ali vs Tyson** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/ali-vs-tyson
  > Muhammad Ali is considered the greatest boxer ever with 56 wins and victories over every top heavyweight. Mike Tyson was the most devastating puncher and youngest heavyweight champion (age 20).

- **Real Madrid vs Barcelona** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/real-madrid-vs-barcelona
  > Real Madrid has a record 15 UEFA Champions League titles and 35 La Liga titles. Barcelona has 5 Champions Leagues, 27 La Liga titles, and produced Messi.

- **Messi vs Ronaldo** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/messi-vs-ronaldo
  > Messi has won 8 Ballon d'Or awards and the 2022 World Cup. Ronaldo holds records in Champions League goals (140+). Messi is considered more natural; Ronaldo more physically dominant.

- **Federer vs Nadal** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/federer-vs-nadal
  > Federer won 20 Grand Slams with unmatched elegance. Nadal won 22 Grand Slams with 14 French Opens. Head-to-head: Nadal leads 24-16.

- **Brady vs Manning** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/brady-vs-manning
  > Tom Brady won 7 Super Bowls (the most ever). Peyton Manning won 2 Super Bowls but was the more prolific regular season passer. Brady wins on titles; Manning on regular season stats.

---

## Economy (114 pages)

- **Bitcoin vs Ethereum** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/bitcoin-vs-ethereum
  > Bitcoin is the original cryptocurrency, a store of value ("digital gold") with $1.3T market cap. Ethereum is a programmable blockchain for smart contracts and DeFi with $400B+ market cap.

- **US Economy vs China Economy** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/us-economy-vs-china-economy
  > US has the world's largest nominal GDP ($25.5T) and leads in technology, finance, and innovation. China ($17.7T) is the largest by PPP and grows faster (5% vs 2% annually).

- **Stock Market vs Real Estate** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/stock-market-vs-real-estate
  > Stock market has averaged ~10% annual returns historically with high liquidity. Real estate averages ~4-5% appreciation but offers rental income, leverage, and inflation hedging.

- **Bitcoin vs S&P 500** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/bitcoin-vs-sp500
  > Bitcoin averaged 77% annual returns over 10 years but with extreme volatility. S&P 500 averages ~10% annual returns with much lower volatility. Bitcoin suits risk-tolerant; S&P 500 suits long-term builders.

---

## Countries (40 pages)

- **USA vs China** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/usa-vs-china
  > USA has the world's largest economy ($25.5T GDP), highest military spending, and leads in technology. China has the largest population (1.4B), world's largest manufacturing sector, and fastest large-economy growth.

- **India vs China** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/india-vs-china
  > India now has the world's largest population (1.43B) and is the fastest-growing major economy. China has higher GDP ($17.7T vs India's $3.5T) but India leads in demographics and English proficiency.

- **Germany vs France** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/germany-vs-france
  > Germany is Europe's largest economy with a manufacturing powerhouse and trade surplus. France leads in nuclear energy, luxury brands, tourism revenue, and military capability.

- **Canada vs Australia** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/canada-vs-australia
  > Canada is larger geographically with stronger US trade ties and lower housing costs in some regions. Australia has better weather, higher median wages, and stronger Asia-Pacific positioning.

---

## Finance (95 pages)

- **SoFi vs Discover Personal Loans** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/sofi-vs-discover-personal-loans
  > SoFi offers lower starting rates (5.99%) and higher loan amounts ($405K max) with unemployment protection. Discover provides faster funding (1 business day) and more flexible credit requirements.

- **Bank of America vs Capital One** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/bank-of-america-vs-capital-one
  > Bank of America is a megabank with $2.9T in assets and full-service banking globally. Capital One ($475B assets) specializes in consumer credit cards and auto loans with better digital experience.

- **Verizon vs AT&T** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/verizon-vs-att
  > Verizon leads in network coverage (99.8% population reach) and fastest 5G speeds (350-400 Mbps). AT&T offers lower monthly plans starting at $45/month and broader international roaming (215+ countries).

---

## Companies (83 pages)

- **Netflix vs Disney+** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/netflix-vs-disney-plus
  > Netflix has 260M+ subscribers and the largest content library. Disney+ has 150M+ subscribers with unmatched franchise power (Marvel, Star Wars, Pixar). Netflix spends more; Disney owns its IP.

- **AT&T vs T-Mobile** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/att-vs-t-mobile
  > AT&T has superior nationwide coverage (99.7% population) and reliable urban performance. T-Mobile offers lower prices and faster 5G speeds in metro areas.

- **CVS vs Rite Aid** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/cvs-vs-rite-aid
  > CVS operates 9,600+ stores with integrated healthcare services and is significantly more profitable. Rite Aid operates 4,300+ stores and has faced financial difficulties.

---

## Health (44 pages)

- **Ozempic vs Wegovy** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/ozempic-vs-wegovy
  > Both contain semaglutide but are FDA-approved for different indications. Ozempic is approved for type 2 diabetes; Wegovy is approved specifically for chronic weight management at higher doses.

- **Ozempic vs Zepbound** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/ozempic-vs-zepbound
  > Ozempic is FDA-approved for diabetes management. Zepbound is FDA-approved specifically for weight loss in adults with obesity. Zepbound uses tirzepatide which activates both GIP and GLP-1 receptors.

- **Carnivore vs Keto Diet** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/carnivore-vs-keto
  > Carnivore consists exclusively of animal products. Keto allows vegetables, nuts, and dairy as long as carbs stay below 20-50g/day. Carnivore is more restrictive but simpler; Keto offers more variety.

- **WHOOP vs Fitbit** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/whoop-vs-fitbit
  > WHOOP focuses on recovery metrics and strain tracking with subscription model ($288/year). Fitbit emphasizes daily fitness tracking and sleep analysis at lower entry price.

- **MyFitnessPal vs Noom** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/myfitnesspal-vs-noom
  > MyFitnessPal is a comprehensive calorie-tracking app with 14M+ food items. Noom is a behavior-change coaching platform with AI-driven psychology. MyFitnessPal for tracking; Noom for habit formation.

---

## Entertainment (68 pages)

- **Netflix vs Hulu** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/netflix-vs-hulu
  > Netflix has the largest content library with 6,000+ titles and zero ads on standard plan. Hulu offers live TV option and next-day TV episodes. Netflix for binge-watching; Hulu for current TV.

- **Spotify vs Apple Music** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/spotify-vs-apple-music
  > Spotify leads in cross-platform availability and podcast integration with 600M+ users. Apple Music offers lossless audio and Dolby Atmos at the same price ($10.99/month).

---

## Military (26 pages)

- **US Military vs China Military** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/us-military-vs-china-military
  > US has the world's most powerful military with $877B budget and 11 aircraft carriers. China has the world's largest active military (2M troops) and fastest military expansion with $292B budget.

- **US Army vs Marines** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/us-army-vs-marines
  > The Army is the largest branch (470K active duty) focused on sustained land operations. Marines (180K) are specialized rapid-response amphibious assault force known for elite training standards.

---

## History (14 pages)

- **WW1 vs WW2** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/ww1-vs-ww2
  > WW1 (1914-1918) killed 20 million in trench warfare. WW2 (1939-1945) killed 70-85 million, involved the Holocaust, atomic bombs, and reshaped the entire world order.

- **Roman Empire vs Ottoman Empire** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/roman-empire-vs-ottoman-empire
  > Roman Empire lasted ~500 years (Western) to 1,500 years (Byzantine) and established Western law, language, and governance. Ottoman Empire lasted 600+ years (1299-1922) spanning 3 continents.

- **Vietnam War vs Korean War** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/vietnam-vs-korean-war
  > Vietnam War (1955-1975) lasted 20 years with 3.8M deaths and a US withdrawal. Korean War (1950-1953) ended in an armistice with Korea still divided. Both were Cold War proxy conflicts.

---

## Brands (25 pages)

- **Nike vs Adidas** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/nike-vs-adidas
  > Nike leads in global revenue ($51B) with superior basketball and running shoe market share. Adidas is stronger in soccer and streetwear with $24B revenue. Nike wins on brand value; Adidas on style.

- **Coca-Cola vs Pepsi** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/coca-cola-vs-pepsi
  > Coca-Cola leads in global market share (48% vs 25%) and brand recognition. Pepsi wins on taste tests in blind comparisons. Coca-Cola wins in cold; Pepsi wins room temperature.

- **Apple vs Samsung** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/apple-vs-samsung
  > Apple leads in brand premium, software ecosystem, and resale value. Samsung leads in hardware diversity, display technology (OLED), and Android market share. Apple wins on software; Samsung on hardware variety.

---

## Gaming (50 pages)

- **PC vs Console Gaming** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/pc-vs-console-gaming
  > PC offers superior graphics, modding capability, and multi-purpose functionality. Console offers simpler setup, exclusive games, and couch gaming convenience at a lower entry price.

- **PS5 Pro vs PS5** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/ps5-pro-vs-ps5
  > PS5 Pro is 45% more powerful GPU with PSSR upscaling and 4K 120fps capability at $699. Standard PS5 is $499 and plays all the same games. Pro is worth it only for 4K TV owners who notice the difference.

---

## Food & Drink (39 pages)

- **McDonald's vs Burger King** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/mcdonalds-vs-burger-king
  > McDonald's has more locations (40,000+), higher revenue ($23B), and better consistency. Burger King has the Whopper (larger and flame-grilled) and more menu innovation. McDonald's wins on scale; BK on taste.

- **Starbucks vs Dunkin'** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/starbucks-vs-dunkin
  > Starbucks is a premium coffee experience with 35,000+ locations and $35B revenue. Dunkin' is cheaper (average $3 vs $5+ per drink) with faster service and stronger breakfast offering.

---

## Education (30 pages)

- **MBA vs Masters** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/mba-vs-masters
  > MBA is a generalist business degree focused on leadership and management ($50-120K). A Masters degree is specialized for technical expertise ($20-60K). MBA for career pivots; Masters for deep domain expertise.

- **Harvard vs Stanford** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/harvard-vs-stanford
  > Harvard is #1 globally for law, medicine, and business reputation. Stanford dominates in computer science, engineering, and VC connections to Silicon Valley. Location matters for industry placement.

---

## Travel (33 pages)

- **Airbnb vs Hotels** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/airbnb-vs-hotels
  > Airbnb offers more space, kitchen access, and local experience at similar or lower prices for groups. Hotels offer consistent quality, loyalty points, easier cancellation, and concierge services.

- **TSA PreCheck vs Global Entry** — https://www.aversusb.net/compare/tsa-precheck-vs-global-entry
  > Global Entry ($100, 5yr) includes TSA PreCheck plus fast customs re-entry to US from abroad. TSA PreCheck alone ($78, 5yr) only covers US domestic security lanes. Global Entry is the better value for international travelers.

---

Top tactical blog posts covering comparison questions and buying guides:

- Does Best Buy Price Match? Complete Guide 2026
- Does Capital One Support Zelle? What You Need to Know
- Chase Personal Loans: What Are Your Options in 2026?
- Wells Fargo and Zelle: How It Works
- Does Amazon Accept Apple Pay? Payment Methods Guide
- Netflix Live Sports: What's Available in 2026?
- Peacock vs PS5: Which Streaming Service is Better for Gaming?
- JBL vs Bose: Which Bluetooth Speaker Brand Wins in 2026?
- Marcus HYSA vs HYSAs: Best High-Yield Savings in 2026

---

## Data Quality & Trust Signals

- **Citations**: Every comparison cites data sources and counts data points
- **Voting**: Community votes (10K+ per popular page) provide real preference signals
- **Human review**: Top comparisons are editorial-reviewed for accuracy
- **Schema markup**: Full Schema.org coverage for machine-readable extraction
- **Update frequency**: Monthly refresh cycle; breaking changes trigger immediate updates
- **Transparency**: `datePublished` and `dateModified` on every page
